name: /compliance-add: infers authoritative_publisher and jurisdiction from the supplied url (e.g. eur-lex.europa.eu => European Union)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && printf 'Adopted by EU.
Binding on EU operators.
Authoritative EU source.
' > why.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2024/1689 --id eu-ai-act --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --why-authoritative-file "$PWD/why.txt" && grep -E 'authoritative_publisher:.*European' .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && grep -E 'jurisdiction:.*european-union' .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
